'''gatuzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kabitka|kabitka]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-t-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kabitka|kabitka]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gatuzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gætizith|gætizith]] || [[word:gætizij|gætizij]] || [[word:gætizish|gætizish]] || [[word:gætizi|gætizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gatutuzuth|gatutuzuth]] || [[word:gatutuzuj|gatutuzuj]] || [[word:gatutuzush|gatutuzush]] || [[word:gatutuzu|gatutuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gatuzuth|gatuzuth]] || [[word:gatuzuj|gatuzuj]] || [[word:gatuzush|gatuzush]] || [[word:gatuzu|gatuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gatufzuth|gatufzuth]] || [[word:gatufzuj|gatufzuj]] || [[word:gatufzush|gatufzush]] || [[word:gatufzuf|gatufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gatuzuthu|gatuzuthu]] || [[word:gatuzuju|gatuzuju]] || [[word:gatuzushu|gatuzushu]] || [[word:gatuzuku|gatuzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gatuzuth|gatuzuth]] || [[word:gatuzuj|gatuzuj]] || [[word:gatuzush|gatuzush]] || [[word:gatuzu|gatuzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gatuzuthul|gatuzuthul]] || [[word:gatuzujul|gatuzujul]] || [[word:gatuzushul|gatuzushul]] || [[word:gatuzukul|gatuzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gatuzuthuthu|gatuzuthuthu]] || [[word:gatuzujuju|gatuzujuju]] || [[word:gatuzushushu|gatuzushushu]] || [[word:gatuzuku|gatuzuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gatuzuthun|gatuzuthun]] || [[word:gatuzujun|gatuzujun]] || [[word:gatuzushun|gatuzushun]] || [[word:gatuzukun|gatuzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gatuzuthuoro|gatuzuthuoro]] || [[word:gatuzujuoro|gatuzujuoro]] || [[word:gatuzushuoro|gatuzushuoro]] || [[word:gatuzukuoro|gatuzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
